subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Jinab-i-Aqa Tahir Nur-i-Bahir, in a letter to one of the friends of God, made mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله جناب آقا طاهر نور باهر محبت الله در مکتوب بیکی از احباء الله ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant
